prompt: Generate a vertical fashion photo for social media. The setting is the plaza area in front of Shibuya Station, Tokyo. A metropolitan location reminiscent of Hachiko Square, with wide pedestrian pavement, passing crowds, and station-side commercial buildings and facades in the background. Do not focus on specific monuments, but keep the background atmosphere of a typical Shibuya public plaza. Don't blur the background too much; keep enough to sense the local vibe. The subject is a Japanese or Korean woman in her early 20s. Tall and slim with a sophisticated fashion model vibe. Long limbs, natural beautiful posture, and an elegant urban impression. Mature features with a soft expression. Natural makeup, transparent skin, and a calm, charming aura. Long wavy hair, center-parted, in deep brown. The hair should have a natural texture, appearing slightly translucent in soft light. The coordination is Y2K streetwear. A white scoop-neck crop tank top with wide shoulder straps and a simple front design. Low-rise light wash oversized wide-leg jeans with a white waistband slightly visible. Silver cross charm chain near the front pocket. Cream-colored shoulder bag with a chunky chain strap and smooth leather. Translucent pale lavender rectangular glasses. Layered silver necklaces, small green charms, delicate drop earrings, bracelets, rings, and natural nails. White pointed-toe ankle boots. Composition is 9:16 vertical, natural angle like a 35mm lens. Cowboy or American shot framing from above the knee. Natural eye-level camera position. Subject is at an angle, looking back while walking. Expression is calm, confident, and slightly ethereal. High-key street photo with bright, soft lighting. Slightly overexposed sunlight, cool pastel tones, low contrast. Urban but not aggressive, with a documentary feel like a captured moment of daily life. Shallow depth of field to separate the subject while preserving the Shibuya atmosphere. Realistic skin, fabric textures, and lifelike depth. No text or logos in the image.
